description_long: This is a modern, two-story house set within a landscaped lot surrounded by a perimeter fence. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and dark exterior finishes, giving it a contemporary appearance. The property includes a swimming pool, a driveway with parked cars, and lush gardens with numerous trees and shrubs, some of which are flowering. Outdoor living spaces such as patios and seating areas are visible, enhancing the home's connection to its environment. The main entryway is prominent, with a paved path leading to a covered entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a swimming pool, and landscaped gardens, enclosed by a fence. The property features outdoor living areas, a driveway, and abundant greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, swimming pool, and lush landscaping with flowering trees.
description_view_1: Rear/side view highlighting the backyard, additional garden space, and a secondary building or garage.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the driveway, parked cars, and the main entry path.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the driveway, garage area, and more of the garden and outdoor seating.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, wide steps, and a prominent modern door, flanked by landscaping and paved path
